units.description: Decodes cmd[2:0] into one of CLEAR, LOAD, INC, DEC, HOLD, or INVALID (reserved treated as HOLD). Purely combinational logic.
8-bit saturating counter register with next-state logic. Includes accepted_count (32-bit wrapping) and last_cmd (3-bit) registers. Saturates at 0 and 255.

protocol.description: Valid-ready command interface with always-ready sink (cmd_ready=1). Single-cycle acceptance, no backpressure.

register.description: No firmware-visible CSR registers. State is accessed only through native command interface and output ports.

datapath.description: 8-bit saturating up/down counter datapath: count register, next-state mux, zero/max flag comparators, accepted_count incrementer.

fsm.description: No sequential FSM. Combinational command decode drives registered counter update directly.

error.description: Invalid/reserved command encodings (5-7) treated as HOLD. No error output signal. accepted_count still increments.

security.description: Non-secure leaf IP. No privilege model. Counter state is deterministic from command sequence.

owners.responsibility: Top-level integration module implementing all decomposed units
